emails.subject: conf call
emails.body: conf call thursday 4:45p. let me know if you have a conflict, there will be a callin number. hope your thanksgiving went well, we had a great trip to all the parent's farms. pretty ridiculous. hdt

emails.subject: RE: conf call
emails.body: RE: conf call i am in, we had a great time. To: Mckay, Brad

emails.subject: RE: conf call
emails.body: we should get together beforehand to talk. when would you be available? 15 min should do it. To: Thames, Davis

emails.subject: RE: conf call
emails.body: anytime after 4 is good To: Mckay, Brad
